name: United Bank & Trust Co.
description_short: Community bank offering checking, savings, loans, and wealth management services with multiple account types and digital banking options.
description_long:
United Bank & Trust is a community-focused banking institution serving personal and business customers through a network of physical locations and digital channels. The bank operates a full-service retail and commercial banking platform, with a primary contact phone number of 641-753-5900, suggesting regional roots in Iowa.

The bank provides a comprehensive suite of personal banking products including relationship checking accounts, savings and money market accounts, CDs with promotional rates, IRAs, and various loan products (mortgage, home equity, personal, auto, and student loans). They offer digital banking through online and mobile platforms, card management services, mobile wallet and peer-to-peer payment capabilities, and text banking. Additional personal services include safe deposit boxes, savings bonds, financial literacy resources, and notary/medallion signature guarantee services.

On the business side, United Bank & Trust provides commercial checking, business money market accounts, business savings, commercial loans, and specialized agriculture lending including beginning farm loans. They offer treasury management services, receivables and payables management, liquidity optimization, and fraud prevention tools specifically designed for business customers.

The bank distinguishes itself through specialized agriculture lending programs and wealth solutions with dedicated advisors. Their "lifestage checklist" approach and emphasis on financial literacy suggest a commitment to customer education. However, as a community bank, their geographic footprint appears limited to specific regions, and the website provides minimal information about specific product terms, interest rates, or lending criteria, which may require direct contact for detailed comparisons.
services: Certificates of Deposit (CDs) with promotional rates
Home Equity Loans and Lines of Credit
Agriculture loans and Beginning Farm loans
Commercial checking and business savings accounts
Online and mobile banking with card management
Treasury Management Services (receivables, payables, liquidity optimization)
Wealth Solutions and investment advisory services
pros: Offers online account opening in 5 minutes or less for convenient access
Comprehensive agricultural lending programs including beginning farm loans with dedicated lenders
Wealth Solutions with dedicated advisors for retirement planning and investment strategies
Full range of digital banking: online, mobile, card management, mobile wallet, P2P, and text banking
Business-specific treasury management services including receivables, payables, and liquidity optimization
Multiple loan types under one institution (mortgage, home equity, personal, auto, student, agriculture)
Fraud prevention and identity theft protection services across personal and business accounts
cons: Limited geographic presence as a regional community bank, not available nationwide
Website provides no interest rates, APRs, or specific product terms requiring customers to call or visit branches
No information about minimum account balances, monthly fees, or fee waivers
Agricultural lending focus may not serve general consumer market equally well
Limited details on competitive advantages compared to national banks or credit unions
best_for: Agricultural businesses and beginning farmers seeking specialized lending programs
Customers in the bank's service region seeking comprehensive personal and business banking relationships
Individuals planning retirement who want dedicated wealth advisor consultation
Small business owners needing integrated treasury management and commercial lending services
diagnosis: United Bank & Trust is best for personal and business customers in their regional service area seeking a full-service community bank with agricultural lending expertise and wealth advisory services. The main caveat is that this is a geographically limited institution, so availability depends entirely on location, and prospective customers will need to contact the bank directly for specific product terms and rates as the website lacks detailed pricing information.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
